query.queryText:
SELECT
  t.merchant_id
FROM rt_sql_bench_10m.transactions AS t
WHERE t.transaction_id = 5000335
LIMIT 1

insights.body: Table "main.rt_sql_bench_10m.transactions" is manually optimized, performance can degrade overtime.
insights.recommendation: Enable automatic clustering on  table "main.rt_sql_bench_10m.transactions" to reduce number of bytes read.
insights.simplifiedRecommendation: Convert  table "main.rt_sql_bench_10m.transactions" to cluster by auto.
